response.overview: Although their hearts are not united, Soraya and Haidar are still brought together during Ramadan by the will of Soraya's mother. Because of this, Soraya's relationship with her mother becomes cold. Soraya becomes angry when Haidar grows close to Kalsom. Unexpectedly, Haidar and Kalsom are hiding a secret.
response.title: Raya Sebagai Isteri
